---
title: "Evolutionary subset search and modeling using gesearch"
author: 
 - name: Leonardo Ramirez-Lopez
   email: ramirez.lopez.leo@gmail.com
date: today
bibliography: resemble.bib
csl: elsevier-harvard.csl  
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    highlight-style: github
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: left
    code-overflow: wrap
    smooth-scroll: true
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Evolutionary subset search using gesearch}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
---

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="70%"}
> *Think Globally, Fit Locally*, @saul2003think
:::
::: {.column width="30%"}
<img src="logo.png" style="width: 150%; max-width: 150px;">
:::
::::

# Introduction

ddd

# References
